message:
feat: per-pane process tree capture (wa-1i6d)

Add process_tree module with:
- ProcessTree/ProcessNode types for full process hierarchy
- Linux: /proc/{pid}/{stat,cmdline,status} parsing (safe)
- macOS: ps/pgrep command-based capture (no FFI)
- PaneActivity inference from process names (agent, compiling,
  testing, editing, vcs, idle)
- 23 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
